title: WHMIS News - Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System - Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## WHMIS News - Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System - Health Canada
WHMIS News is an email list used by Health Canada to distribute the latest news and information relating to Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System (WHMIS).
Membership is open to the public. Subscribers receive an update when Health Canada provides new information regarding WHMIS, such as, the implementation of the Globally Harmonized System of Classification and Labelling of Chemicals (GHS) for workplace chemicals.
To subscribe, please send an e-mail to the address below:
E-mail Address: whmis-subscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca
Subject line: Subscribe to the Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System (WHMIS) News
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, please send an e-mail to the below address:
E-mail: whmis-unsubscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca
Subject line: Unsubscribe to the Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System (WHMIS) News
Please note: All e-mail addresses are treated confidentially. Subscribers are not able to view individual e-mail addresses and Health Canada will not share e-mail addresses. Health Canada will not use your e-mail address for any other purpose.
If you have comments or questions about the program, please contact us .
